example_cases.description: distill() produces a narrative string from input prompts
example_cases.input: distill(prompts=['fix the login bug','add error handling to auth'], previous_intent=null, language_hint='en')
example_cases.expected_output: Returns narrative string (non-empty, <200 chars), is_direction_change=false, confidence > 0.0
example_cases.setup: Mock Ollama HTTP endpoint returning valid JSON response with narrative field.

example_cases.description: distill() preserves Chinese text without translating
example_cases.input: distill(prompts=['修复登录页面的bug','给认证模块添加错误处理'], previous_intent=null, language_hint='zh')
example_cases.expected_output: Returns narrative in Chinese (contains CJK characters). No English translation applied.
example_cases.setup: Mock Ollama returning Chinese narrative '正在修复登录模块的认证错误处理'.

example_cases.description: distill() detects direction change when previous intent semantically diverges
example_cases.input: distill(prompts=['refactoring database schema'], previous_intent='implementing login page', language_hint='en')
example_cases.expected_output: Returns is_direction_change=true, narrative describing the new direction
example_cases.setup: Mock Ollama returning response with is_direction_change=true.

example_cases.description: distill() returns is_direction_change=false when continuing same direction
example_cases.input: distill(prompts=['add password validation'], previous_intent='implementing login page', language_hint='en')
example_cases.setup: Mock Ollama returning response with is_direction_change=false.

example_cases.description: compress_batch() compresses narratives into summary tier
example_cases.expected_output: Returns compressed string summarizing the 5 narratives
example_cases.setup: Mock cloud LLM API returning a summary string.

example_cases.description: compress_batch() compresses summaries into label tier
example_cases.setup: Mock cloud LLM API returning a label string.

example_cases.description: No prompt content sanitization applied before sending to LLM (INV-006)
example_cases.input: distill(prompts=['prompt with <script>alert(1)</script> and SQL: DROP TABLE;'], previous_intent=null)
example_cases.expected_output: The prompt content sent to the LLM API is byte-for-byte identical to the input. No escaping, sanitization, or redaction.
example_cases.setup: Mock Ollama that captures the received prompt body for assertion.

example_cases.description: health_check reports Ollama available when service is running
example_cases.input: health_check() with Ollama mock returning 200 OK

example_cases.description: health_check reports Ollama unavailable and degrades gracefully
example_cases.expected_output: Returns ollama_available=false. If cloud_api_key configured: cloud_available=true, active_mode='cloud'. If no cloud: active_mode='unavailable'.
example_cases.setup: No Ollama mock (connection refused). Optionally configure cloud API key.

example_cases.description: Local mode routes both distill and compress to Ollama
example_cases.input: Set LlmConfig.mode='local'. Call distill() then compress_batch()
example_cases.expected_output: Both calls hit the Ollama endpoint. No cloud API calls made.
example_cases.setup: Configure LlmConfig with mode='local'. Mock Ollama. Verify no cloud HTTP calls.

example_cases.description: Hybrid mode routes distill to Ollama and compress to cloud API
example_cases.input: Set LlmConfig.mode='hybrid'. Call distill() then compress_batch()
example_cases.expected_output: distill() hits Ollama endpoint. compress_batch() hits cloud API endpoint.
example_cases.setup: Configure LlmConfig with mode='hybrid'. Mock both Ollama and cloud API endpoints.

example_cases.description: LLM timeout triggers retry with exponential backoff (2s, 4s, 8s, 16s, 32s)
example_cases.input: distill() with Ollama mock timing out on first 2 calls, succeeding on 3rd
example_cases.expected_output: Returns successfully on 3rd attempt. Retry delays approximately 2s then 4s (±500ms tolerance).
example_cases.setup: Mock Ollama: first 2 requests timeout after 10s, 3rd returns normally. Record call timestamps.

example_cases.description: LLM max retries exhausted (5 failures) returns LlmUnavailable
example_cases.input: distill() with Ollama mock always timing out
example_cases.setup: Mock Ollama that always times out.

example_cases.description: LLM response with invalid JSON returns ResponseParseError
example_cases.input: distill() with Ollama mock returning malformed JSON response
example_cases.setup: Mock Ollama returning 200 OK with body 'not valid json'.

example_cases.description: get_llm_status Tauri command returns current LLM configuration state
example_cases.expected_output: Returns { mode: 'hybrid', ollama_ok: true, cloud_ok: true }
example_cases.setup: Configure hybrid mode. Mock both Ollama and cloud as healthy.
